name: Ondansetron
description: Xulashada 5-HT3 receptor antagonist antiemetic. Aad waxtar ugu leh lallabada iyo matagga. ODT (kiniin afka ka baxa) ayaa faa'iido u leh goobaha goobta marka IV la waayo. Waxaa ku jira qaar ka mid ah xirmooyinka kaniiniyada dagaalka.
indications: Lalabbo iyo matag (kemotherapy, opioid-induced, post-operative, TBI-related)
dose: 4-8 mg IV/IO tartiib tartiib ah 2-5 daqiiqo. ODT: 4-8 mg ku milmay carrabka hoostiisa. IM: 4 mg.
contraindications: Xasaasiyadda la og yahay ee ondansetron ama 5-HT3 kale ee ka soo horjeeda
Cudurka QT ee dheer ee lagu dhasho (qiyaas sare IV oo keliya)
warnings: Qiyaasta sare ee IV waxay dheerayn kartaa muddada QT -- isticmaal qiyaasta IV ee ugu waxtarka badan.
Ma beddelo maaraynta marin-haweedka bukaan-jiifka ah matag -- ka ilaali marin-haweedka marka hore.

pediatric.dose: 0.1-0.15 mg/kg IV (ugu badnaan 4 mg). ODT: 4mg ee carruurta> 4 sano.
pediatric.note: Si weyn loo isticmaalo oo si wanaagsan loogu dulqaadanayo caafimaadka carruurta.

obstetric.note: Xog xadidan ee uurka U isticmaal lallabbo/ matag daran ka dib saddexda bilood ee hore marka faa'iidooyinka ay ka badan yihiin khatarta. Laguma talinayo saddexda bilood ee hore.
